trending_visual_themes: emotional race finish — athlete touching the wall, looking up at scoreboard
NZ open water autumn coastal or harbour swim — golden-hour scenic setting
cinematic triathlete ocean entry — dramatic wave action and athlete silhouette
race day kit flat lay — performance gear arranged poolside or on a dock
aerial perspective of open water swim pack in NZ harbour or lake
recommended_visual_style: cinematic low-angle open water swimmer mid-stroke in NZ harbour at autumn dawn, golden teal and orange tones, glassy reflective water with green hill reflections, moody and aspirational
content_angle: NZ autumn open water season — the wild, scenic proving ground that pool training alone can't replicate
key_insight: Emotional storytelling through scenic NZ location shots outperforms studio-style content in the swim/triathlon niche — authentic real-world environments drive saves and shares, and NZ's autumn open water calendar is actively running with events at Lake Taupo and coastal harbours.
previously_used_visual_themes: 5am dark indoor pool before dawn — lone swimmer, warm mist rising from lane-lit water, pre-dawn motivational angle
